theme_info.title: myPollyPocket
theme_info.author: mp3li
theme_info.description: Polly Pocket theme for the Innioasis Y1 mp3 player, including Polly Pocket icons and Polly Pocket backgrounds. Check the Patreon for the other Y2K Toybox themes.
